Title: ~mission(Contractor|DestroyProbeTitle)
DisplayDescription:
ABOUT THE JOB
At microTech, we aim to foster a contract experience that is collaborative, friendly and fun. We are looking for a detail-oriented pilot who brings an analytical mind to problem solving and deep knowledge of strategic combat solutions to complete this project on time and with few to no errors. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
* Scan the area to locate the ~mission(Contractor|DestroyProbeAmount) that have been preforming illegal surveillance while hidden in microTech controlled space. 
* These so-called "data skimmers" are equipped with security protocols that will attempt to upload their datastores when attacked.
* Destroy all the skimmers before the upload can complete.
 
LOCATION
~mission(Location|Address)

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
* Equivalency degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of combined mercenary and security experience with an emphasis on combat piloting.
* Ability to procure a combat rated ship.
* Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
* Experience with PDC Monitors.
* Strong scanning and demolition skills.
